Problem.title: The Current Problem with Validations
Problem.description: Current manual processes are inefficient, inconsistent, and opaque, generating frustration for both students and academic registrars.

slow.description: Manual review that can take weeks or months

inconsistent.title: Inconsistent Decisions

opaque.title: Lack of Transparency

Pipeline.title: How It Works: 5-Step Pipeline

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Find answers to the most common questions about Certified. If you don't find what you're looking for, don't hesitate to contact us.

trial.q: What does the free trial include?
trial.a: The 30-day trial period includes full access to all Professional plan features, up to 1,000 validations, full technical support, and initial training for your team.

calculation.a: Each processed academic transcript counts as one validation, regardless of the number of subjects. Partial analyses or drafts do not consume your quota.

changePlan.q: Can I change plans at any time?
changePlan.a: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes are applied immediately and the cost is prorated based on usage.

discounts.q: Do you offer discounts for multiple years?
discounts.a: Yes, we offer 15% discounts for annual contracts and 25% for 3-year contracts. There are also special discounts for university consortiums.

limit.q: What happens if I exceed my monthly limit?
limit.a: We notify you when you reach 80% of your limit. You can buy additional packages or automatically upgrade to the next plan.

implementation.a: Standard implementation is included in all plans. For complex integrations or specific customizations, we offer additional professional services.

blockchain.q: What exactly is stored on blockchain?
blockchain.a: Only cryptographic hashes, technical metadata (timestamps, algorithm versions), and transaction IDs are stored on blockchain. Personal data is never stored. The complete document with details is stored on IPFS with controlled access.

algorithm.q: How exactly is the 80% similarity calculated?
algorithm.a: The score is calculated using semantic embeddings of content (40%), learning outcomes (30%), competencies (20%), and methodological structure (10%). Each component has specific algorithms and the result is weighted according to these percentages to obtain the final 0-100 score.

ects.q: What happens if ECTS do not match exactly?
ects.a: We apply flexible thresholds: ±1 ECTS for 6 ECTS subjects, ±2 for >9 ECTS subjects. If the difference exceeds the threshold, it is marked as "manual review required" but the content may still be valid. The system always explains the difference in ECTS.

signature.a: The platform generates the technical report with score and justifications. The institutional signature is performed by authorized academic registrar personnel using their eIDAS/FNMT certificate. Certified facilitates the process but does not replace institutional authority.

nonEcts.q: Does the system work with non-ECTS subjects?
nonEcts.a: Yes, we have conversion modules for US, Asian, and other credit systems. The system first normalizes to equivalent ECTS before content analysis. We also handle teaching hour systems.

labs.q: How do you handle practical or lab subjects?
labs.a: Practical subjects are evaluated by methodology, required equipment, technical competencies, and lab time. The algorithm has specific modules for clinical practices, engineering labs, workshops, etc.

disagreement.q: What happens if a university disagrees with the result?
disagreement.a: The system includes an appeal workflow. The institution can mark discrepancy, provide additional information, and request review. Everything is documented on blockchain. The final result is always decided by the competent academic authority.

security.q: How do you ensure academic data security?
security.a: AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transmission, multi-factor authentication, network segregation, and regular security audits. We comply with ISO 27001 and GDPR. Personal data never leaves the institution's controlled environment.

learning.q: Does the system learn and improve over time?
learning.a: Yes, we implement machine learning with feedback from institutional decisions. When a registrar corrects or confirms a result, the system learns for similar future cases. Always preserving privacy and with bias controls.

time.q: How long does it take to implement in a university?
time.a: Typical implementation: 4-8 weeks. Includes SIS integration, team training, specific rule configuration, and testing period. For complex multi-campus implementations, it may take 12-16 weeks.

support.q: What support do you offer after implementation?
support.a: We offer 24/7 technical support, regular algorithm updates, continuous training for new users, and a dedicated customer success manager. We also include proactive monitoring and performance optimization.

customization.a: Yes, each university can configure its own thresholds according to its academic policies. We can adjust the minimum threshold, the weights of each score component, and specific rules by subject type or program.

info.title: 1. Information We Collect
info.content: At Certified, we only collect the information necessary to provide our academic validation services:
items: Academic data: transcripts, certificates, course guides
Technical data: usage logs, performance metrics

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
usage.content: Your data is used exclusively for:
items: Communication about the status of your requests
Improvement of our AI algorithms (anonymized data)
Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations

protection.title: 3. Data Protection
items: AES-256 encryption for data at rest

gdpr.title: 4. GDPR Compliance
gdpr.content: As a European company, we strictly comply with GDPR:
items: Legal basis: consent and legitimate interest
Right of access, rectification, and erasure

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.content: Data is retained only for as long as necessary:
items: Validation data: according to academic requirements (7 years)

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Certified, you agree to be legally bound by these terms of service and our privacy policy.

description.title: 2. Service Description
description.content: Certified is an artificial intelligence platform that automates the process of academic credit validation between educational institutions.

acceptableUse.title: 3. Acceptable Use
items: Use the service only for legitimate academic purposes
Not interfere with the system operation

limitations.title: 4. Service Limitations
limitations.content: The service is provided "as is" with the following limitations:
items: AI decisions are recommendations, not definitive
Accuracy depends on the quality of provided data
May require human review in complex cases

responsibilities.title: 5. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content: As a user, you are responsible for:
items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials
Reporting any issues or errors detected

ip.title: 6. Intellectual Property
ip.content: Certified's algorithms, software, and content are protected by intellectual property rights. The data you provide remains your property.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Certified shall not be liable for indirect, consequential, or punitive damages arising from the use of the service.

modifications.title: 8. Modifications
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Significant changes will be notified 30 days in advance.
